Carl was a great support to me when purchasing my new home. 
Knowledgeable and responsive to market conditions. Very generous with time and his office remained available through to completion. The new home card posted to my new home was an appreciate personal touch.  Highly recommend.
Excellent customer service from start to finish.

Brilliant service received from Financial planning from start to finish. Carl Thorne was exceptionally supportive and was able to answer all queries even when there was delay from my side in terms of available documents, he was calm and proved to be in control all along. He was also able to give additional support for insurance purpose. With Carl you can tell you are in good hands from start. Thanks Carl

Rob has been exceptional as ever! He’s been brilliant at helping us to secure a mortgage to get our family home. Everything is explained in layman’s terms, with a friendly service alongside it.

Thank you Rob! We’ve already recommended Rob to a number of friends & will continue to do so.

We had a fantastic experience working with Karen as our mortgage advisor. She went above and beyond to help us maximise our borrowing power, which enabled us to secure the loan we needed from the bank to carry out our house renovations.

Karen's communication was excellent throughout the entire process. She kept us informed every step of the way, answered all our questions promptly, and made what could have been a stressful process feel straightforward and manageable.

We are incredibly grateful for her expertise, professionalism, and support, and we would highly recommend Karen to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and dedicated mortgage advisor.

Alex provided an engaged and prompt service from start to finish. Very knowledgeable, responsive, and made the whole mortgage process straightforward and stress-free. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for expert advice.
Daniel is very organised and has great communication. Luckily he locked in a good deal for us in advance which has saved us hundreds each month as the market changed afterwards!
Excellent.  I have been with the company for 16 years and they have always provided a professional and excellent service.  Highly recommend them.

Excellent services provided by Byrce. He patiently explained all the available options and helped me understand how it works in detail and he was always available for any queries. Overall very happy with the service we received.

We have used Jonathan for both our mortgage and re-mortgage now and he always listens to what we're looking for and help us to find the best deal. When we were unsure about how to approach putting an offer on our first property he gave us advice which helped us secure a brilliant deal. I would highly recommend Jonathan.

It was an absolute pleasure working with Johnny! His patience along the way, matched by his professionalism and knowledge. I will be recommending Johnny to my clients in the future. Thank you for all your help and getting my policy across the line.

Jack and his team provided great service.
Answered all our questions very informative. 
As first time buyer he make the process much easier. We didn't feel lost

Paul Gent and his Team are excellent, professional and tell you the cold hard truth about what would or would not benefit your future. Great to get along with. easy going, yet always airs on the side of devil’s advocate. I would highly recommend Key, Paul, and his amazing team to anyone. Thank you guys. And well done again.
Excellent Service from Karen from start to finish. Always kept in touch with progress. Karen was easy to contact. Dealt with everything efficiently & clearly.
Highly recommend, from the first point of contact till completion Oscar was extremely helpful and responsive. The process was very quick and He was able to get the mortgage in a matter of days.

Very professional and fast
Quick results
Excellent service received from Phil and Louise with our mortgage. Wouldn't use anyone else. Good advice. Kept informed throughout the whole process. Would thoroughly recommend.

Outstanding service from start to finish. The advice was clear, professional, and tailored to my needs throughout the mortgage process. Communication was excellent, and everything was handled efficiently, making the whole experience smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend their services to anyone looking for knowledgeable and first-class financial advice.
Superb service as always!

Richard has been helping us for the last 30 plus years (sorry Richard for the reminder)
Listens, explains, and is never put off by my daft questions. Hasn't steered us wrong and has reminded us when things need sorting.
Wonderful service and wonderful person.
Thank you again!!! *****

I am very happy with the service we received. We have a great mortgage advisor. He is very professional and is on top of things. We were waiting for interest rates to go down in order to renew our mortgage. However, things did not go as we expected, and rather than going down, they went up. Our mortgage advisor acted very promptly to ensure we got the best possible deal before the interest rates went up.

Trevor and his team were fantastic from start to finish and were professional throughout , offering advice for the initial mortgage.  Also both trevor and his receptionist were always on the end of the phone if required. This is not the 1st time I have used trevor and his team and will be using them again when required
Excellent service from Nigel Urban
Friendly, efficient, knowledgeable and reassuring

Philip and his team make the mortgage process so simple and easy, keeping you informed of all the deals/offers available to you. We would highly recommend them and they have looked after us now for 6 years.

From the the very first contact we made with our broker Adam Kowalczyk the whole experiance was simply great. Adam was on the top of the his job all of the time. Ready to help and offer his expert advice at any time of the day or night. He explained to us every part of the process of buying house with clearance and great knowlegde making everything as stress free as possible, from applaying for our morgage to finding solicitors for us. Communication between us was so easy and we got unswers we ever needed always instantly. 
As a people who never new anything about buying houses we are experts now thanks to Adam. We couldn't thank him enough and recommend his service to anyone and everyone who ever thought about buying a house. You would never be let down or dissappointed. He truly helped us to achive our dream of own house. After everything he is more of a friend then just someone who worked for us.

I had a great experience working with Rob on my mortgage renewal. He was very knowledgeable and took me through all the options in detail, carefully explaining everything in a way that was easy to understand. Nothing felt rushed, and he was always happy to answer questions. His support made the whole process much smoother, and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to others.
Fantastic, friendly and knowledgeable service- highly recommend

5 star. We had exceptional customer service and support from our mortgage advisor Surakshya Rai. She truly went above and beyond in supporting us and was with us every step of the way, answering all of our questions and providing great advice as well. She was proactive in chasing lenders, and kept us updated at every stage. She walked us through the entire application process and took all the stress out and got us approved faster than we expected. We are incredibly grateful for everything you did and for being such a big part of this milestone for us.

Emily was excellent in guiding us through our remortgages for properties. 
I didnt have to worry about a thing.
Very professional. The face-2-face appointments go along way. Nothing is too much trouble. Keep up the good work.

I had a great experience with Finance Planning, Jack Humphries was highly efficient, professional, and made the entire process as a first-time buyer smooth, clear, and informative throughout.
I would strongly recommend both Finance Planning and Jack Humphries for their excellent service.

Great service, very pleased with the mortgage product he found for me, excellent.
Jack made what could have been a really stressful process feel completely manageable.
Always receive honest & personable advice. I trust Rob and have recommended him to many friends & family.

Rob Chart from Finance Planning has looked after my mortgage and protection needs for about 10 years now, ever since my wife and I first got on the property ladder. He has been extremely attentive and his knowledge of the market is very reassuring. I’ve recommended him to many friends now and they all have been very happy with his service.

Claire has been absolutely fantastic, and I would highly recommend her. She takes care of everything, giving me complete peace of mind throughout the process. An exceptionally professional, knowledgeable and proactive sercice, providing clear advice that made me feel I was making the right financial decisions, particularly in relation to buying a property. I'd happily recommend Finance Planning to anyone, and very likely will.

The service provided from finance planning is incredible. The guys are extremely knowledgeable and guide you every step of the way. As a first time buyer, the process is very daunting. Lots of information to take in, but Scott has made it so easy to understand.

Very helpful and informative.

Went through all my options and came to the conclusion that best suited my needs.

Could not be more happier with the service received.

We couldn’t recommend Tracey enough, every step of the way she held our hand explained anything we were unsure of and became a real friend in the process, nothing ever felt too much and responses were always timely or catch ups set so we knew exactly what was happening when, Tracey was incredible even the day before we completed when I called her in despair with the solicitors remaining unflinchingly calm!
